name: Metabase
short_desc: Open-source business intelligence — dashboards and SQL on top of any data source.
author: metabase
description: Metabase is a self-hosted business-intelligence platform. Connect it to Postgres, MySQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, Mongo, and 20+ other data sources, then build dashboards, scheduled reports, and ask questions in SQL or via a no-code query builder. This package bundles the open-source Metabase server with a dedicated Postgres 16 database for application data — required for any non-throwaway install since Metabase's default H2 file store is wiped if the container is removed.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled Postgres `metabase` role.

form_fields.label: Encryption Secret Key
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated key Metabase uses to encrypt data-source credentials and other secrets at rest. Once Metabase is in use this key cannot be rotated without re-entering every data-source password.
